title: Stanley Flip Straw 2.0 Sports Water Bottle with Straw 0.7L - 10 Hours Cold - 3 Days Iced - Stainless Steel - BPA Free - Leak Resistant - Fits in Cup Holder - Dishwasher Safe - Frost
features: 3 DAYS COLD WITH ICE: Keep hydrated for longer wherever your day takes you; The Flip Straw 3.0 Bottle keeps your drinks cold for 10 hours and cold for 3 days with ice added; Leakproof and easily packable, this insulated water bottle is the perfect choice

SUSTAINABILITY AT STANLEY: At Stanley, we create a more sustainable world through invention and originality; Committed to eliminating single-use disposables, we aim to increase recycled materials yearly, making sustainability accessible for everyone

EASY-TO-CARRY HANDLE: The handle is perfect for wherever your day takes you; This travel mug is lightweight and therefore designed for your on-the-go lifestyle it can easily be clipped to a bag with a carabiner clip, or simply held in your hand

DISHWASHER SAFE: This thermal flask is designed to clean easily; Throw it into the dishwasher once home, ready to go again the next morning; Every piece of this gym bottle is dishwasher safe; Disassembles into 3 separate pieces for a deep clean
BUILT FOR LIFE: 'Built for Life' has been the Stanley promise since 1913, manufacturing rugged, high-performance products that last a lifetime
